---
title: "Redox resilience architecture figure"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

# Final figure

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 11.6, fig.height = 14, dpi = 600)
```

```{r build-figure}
source("figure_redox_resilience.r")
```

```{r show-figure, out.width='100%'}
fig_redox_resilience 
```
